label: Postgrad Medicine — Decision In Process, day 5
notes: All reviews submitted. AE has sent recommendation to EIC. A decision letter is imminent — this stage typically takes 3-14 days.

label: Sports Sciences — Under Review, week 8
notes: Two reviewers assigned. One reviewer has submitted; second reviewer is late. Editor has sent a reminder. Approaching but not yet at the overdue threshold.

label: Global Health — 75-day 'With Editor' stall
notes: Paper passed desk review but has been in reviewer invitation phase for over 10 weeks. Journal's published average is 18 days. Multiple reviewer invitations have likely been declined.

label: Studies in Higher Education — Reviews Complete, 25 days
notes: All reviewer reports submitted 25 days ago. AE is taking longer than expected to synthesise the reviews and write a recommendation — possibly due to conflicting reviewer opinions.

label: Pain Management — 120-day 'With Editor' extreme delay
notes: Author emailed editorial office at day 60 and was told the paper is under active consideration. No EM status change since submission. Now at 6x the journal's published 22-day average.
